steps.title: Use the sharpened contrast
steps.content: Recent fossil analyses have "sharpened" the picture of hominid life. Because the sentence begins with "Although," the blank should describe the earlier opposite condition: unclear, hazy, or vague.

steps.title: Reject noncontrast meanings
steps.content: Choice A means never seen before, Choice C means complex or detailed, and Choice D means definite. None contrasts with knowledge being sharpened into clarity. The remaining option means vague or hazy. The answer is B.
